logistic_baseline.description: L2-regularized logistic regression with balanced class weights on 7 tabular NLP features

random_forest_tfidf.description: Random Forest combining 7 tabular NLP features with TF-IDF bigrams (500 features) from document text

legal_bert.description: Fine-tuned Legal-BERT (nlpaueb/legal-bert-base-uncased) on document-level text classification with per-person aggregation

stress_test.description: Class imbalance analysis: 51 no-consequence vs 15 with-consequence (77% vs 23%). With 80/20 stratified split, test set has ~11 negative and ~3 positive samples. Small positive class means single misclassification swings F1 significantly.
stress_test.cross_val_note: With 66 total samples and 5-fold CV, each fold has ~13 samples (~10 negative, ~3 positive). Results are inherently unstable due to small sample size.
